privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task uses synthetically generated JStock portfolio data initialized via setup_task.sh. The expected target transaction (MSFT), broker fee (9.99), clearing fee (0.03), and comment ('Q1 2024 core holding') explicitly match the task description and verifier.py logic. The portfolio file path was also confirmed against the setup scripts.
